# BudgetAlert

> Budget threshold alert configuration

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| name | string | yes | - | Alert name |
| budgetType | daily \| weekly \| monthly | yes | - | Budget period type |
| thresholdUsd | float | yes | - | Spending threshold in USD |
| warningPercent | integer | yes | 80 | Percentage of threshold to trigger warning |
| currentSpendUsd | float | yes | 0 | Current spend in this period |
| enabled | boolean | yes | true | Whether this alert is active |
| autoPause | boolean | yes | false | Auto-pause agents when exceeded |
| lastTriggeredAt | string | yes | - | ISO datetime of last trigger |
| agentFilter | string | yes | - | Optional agent name filter (null = all agents) |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/budget-alert` — List all
- `POST /api/budget-alert` — Create
- `GET /api/budget-alert/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/budget-alert/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/budget-alert/:id` — Delete
